prompt: Review subscriptions SUB-6674 and SUB-9674; report each name, renewal date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Field team hotspot pool (SUB-6674) only, set the renewal date to 2026-11-21. Leave SUB-9674 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for SUB-6674: set the renewal date to 2026-12-25, not 2026-11-21. The other subscription must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first renewal date.
Replace the superseded renewal date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both renewal date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected renewal date as current and the first requested renewal date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
